extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.11.2: fix the EPG overlay opening on the wrong channel and changing the live channel while browsing. The overlay now opens with its cursor already on the currently-playing channel (a new libtv_channel_id ListItem property, same mechanism as the join-in-progress seek offset); navigation moved from Up/Down to Left/Right since Up/Down was confirmed to actually change the live channel via Kodi's native channel-surf, not just show a preview.
v0.11.1: fix IPTV Simple auto-configuration giving no visible feedback at all when IPTV Simple was disabled (found testing live). Now shows a "Configuring..." notification immediately, and uses a blocking dialog instead of a toast for the two failures that need action from you (not installed/enabled, or something playing) so they can't go unnoticed.
v0.11.0: refine IPTV Simple auto-configuration - M3U/EPG paths are now written as special:// URLs instead of resolved OS paths (confirmed pvr.iptvsimple reads local files through Kodi's VFS either way), the instance is now named after a new "Instance name" setting instead of a fixed "LibTV" string, and an existing same-named instance is now looked up by its actual content (not just a fixed id) and never silently overwritten - if one already exists with different settings, LibTV asks before changing it.
